text.title: Record-Replay Debugging Core Rules
text.summary: 5 testable rules every record-replay-debugging spec MUST enforce.

rule.statement: Every LLM call and tool call MUST be recorded with input + output + timestamp + nonce. Sampling is forbidden.
rule.rationale: Sampled recordings don't reproduce the bug; full recording is the only honest path.

rule.statement: Replay MUST consume the recording in order; calls that don't match the recorded sequence MUST fail loudly.
Recordings MUST redact secrets, PII, and tokens before persisting.
rule.rationale: Recordings often need to be shared cross-team; secrets MUST not travel.

rule.statement: Recording files MUST carry a schema version + agent code hash.
The spec MUST wire one or more recorded runs into CI as deterministic integration tests.
